name: chart-radial-text
visual_summary: Chart Radial Text is a UI component used to display progress or percentage in a circular, radial format. It's ideal for representing large amounts of data in a concise, easy-to-understand way. Use it when you need to showcase progress or completion percentage to users.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-radial-text
Description: Chart Radial Text is a UI component used to display progress or percentage in a circular, radial format. It's ideal for representing large amounts of data in a concise, easy-to-understand way. Use it when you need to showcase progress or completion percentage to users.
Style: flat, elegant, simple
Interactions: static, disabled, tooltip
Tags: progress indicator, percentage chart, circular metric

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
